concept.conceptName: Urea [Moles/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration

en.name: Urinary urea
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context Urinary urea is the concentration of urea in a urine specimen — typically a spot (random) urine sample [1]. The source data will typically be a single numeric result per patient-timestamp, produced by a biochemistry analyser. Results are reported as a substance concentration in mmol/L (SI unit) or as a mass concentration in mg/dL [2]. ## Included Concepts The set lists three LOINC "Lab Test" concepts measuring the urea concentration in a spot urine specimen: - *3012898 / 22700-9 — Urea [Moles/volume] in Urine (LOINC)*: spot (random) urine sample. Most widely used LOINC code. - *3034734 / 3092-4 — Urea [Mass/volume] in Urine (LOINC)*: same measurand expressed as mass concentration. - *40758738 / 55609-2 — Urea [Moles/volume] in Urine collected for unspecified duration (LOINC)*: used when the source does not specify whether the sample is spot or timed. **Note on units.** Recommended unit follows LOINC's `EXAMPLE_UCUM_UNITS`: **`mmol/L`** (concept 8753 — millimole per litre) for `[Moles/volume]` codes and **`mg/dL`** (concept 8840) for `[Mass/volume]` codes. Conversion: `1 mmol/L urea ≈ 6.01 mg/dL urea`. ## Excluded Concepts The following LOINC concepts that exist for urinary urea are deliberately not part of this set, grouped by reason for exclusion. ### Timed urine collections — different specimen (timed vs. spot) - *3015672 / 25998-6 — Urea [Moles/volume] in 24 hour Urine* - *40766211 / 63481-6 — Urea [Mass/volume] in 24 hour Urine* - *40760501 / 57389-9 — Urea [Mass/volume] in 12 hour Urine* ### Excretion rates — different measurand (amount per unit time, not a concentration) - *3036525 / 25550-5 — Urea [Moles/time] in 24 hour Urine* - *3050448 / 48999-7 — Urea [Mass/time] in 24 hour Urine* - *44786739 / 74082-9 — Urea [Moles/time] in 12 hour Urine* - *40760497 / 57385-7 — Urea [Mass/time] in 12 hour Urine* - *40762084 / 58991-1 — Urea [Mass/time] in 18 hour Urine* - *3040504 / 53137-6 — Urea [Moles/time] in 1 hour Urine* - *3024240 / 32556-3 — Urea [Molar amount] in Urine collected for unspecified duration* ### Ratios — different measurand (ratio to another analyte) - *3008353 / 25999-4 — Urea/Creatinine [Molar ratio] in 24 hour Urine* - *40760115 / 56996-2 — Urea/Creatinine [Mass Ratio] in 24 hour Urine* - *3038276 / 40487-1 — Urea/Creatinine [Ratio] in Urine* - *40762847 / 59786-4 — Urea/Creatinine [Molar ratio] in Urine* - *1617497 / 97187-9 — Urea/Creatinine [Mass Ratio] in Urine* ## Mapping Notes - **Default concept** when the source reports "urinary urea", "urine urea", "spot urine urea" without further specification: `3012898 / 22700-9 — Urea [Moles/volume] in Urine`. By far the most common LOINC code. - **Source reports a 24-hour (or other timed) urine collection**: do **not** map to this concept set. Timed urinary urea is out of scope. - **Source reports a urea-to-creatinine ratio**: do **not** map. These are different measurands. - **Do not confuse with**: urea in blood (separate concept set, "Urea in blood"), urinary urea excretion rate (mmol/24h), urea/creatinine ratio. ## References [1] Regenstrief Institute. LOINC code 22700-9 — Urea [Moles/volume] in Urine. Available: https://loinc.org/22700-9/ [2] Nomenclature for Properties and Units (NPU). IFCC/IUPAC. NPU codes (current release). Available: https://npu-terminology.org/npu-database/
